title: ai transparency note
body:
# AI Transparency Note

This project used AI assistance for:
1. Structuring analytical workflow and research deliverables.
2. Drafting and refactoring reproducible pipeline code.
3. Generating initial documentation language for report sections.

AI was not used to fabricate data or bypass validation. All calculations were executed locally on provided datasets.  
All model formulas, thresholds, and out-of-time validation logic were explicitly coded and verified by the team.

Human responsibility remained with:
1. Topic framing and project option selection.
2. Metric design and robustness criteria.
3. Interpretation of findings and recommendations.
4. Final submission decisions and quality assurance.
